notes: MASTER <-> SITE consolidation. The MASTER tab now hosts the full site-level reference: a section toggle at the top with two pills [FILE | PROFILE]. FILE keeps the existing master-CSV loader (cabinet/host map) behavior — default on tab open, full backward compatibility. PROFILE renders the existing siteProfile_showEditor() (switches, GPU platforms, PDUs, etc.) into a new container inside pg-master — same editor, new home. The BUILD -> SITE subtab pill is removed; the header overflow menu's SITE PROFILE button now routes to MASTER -> PROFILE. Help text 'Open SITE PROFILE from the menu' rewritten to 'Open MASTER -> PROFILE'. The siteProfile_showEditor function, OPS_TABS.site delegate, and all profile data (SITE_PROFILE_KEY in localStorage) are untouched — only the navigation surface changed. Two dead CSS rules for #ops-tab-strip .stab[data-tab='site'] left in place (no element matches them; removing the chunks is unnecessary risk). Builds on v1.6.45 (which carried v1.6.44 IA cleanup + v1.6.43 ENTER circle + brightened boot stars).
